name_cn:
[Original Leather]
Mini leather shoulder bag Cloud shape underarm bag/chain bag ☁
Unique leather scent of original leather, super soft texture, feels very comfortable~ Lined with original lamb leather, overall design is retro and elegant, looks great held in hand or worn on the shoulder, a trendy item that others don't have. Babies, grab it~ [Includes original packaging]
Model: 681632
Size: 24x14x4cm
Strap length: 70cm
